instruction:
## card_07 · Structured Commit and Integration

Workspace: `C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\GameFarmerJS`

---

### Pre-condition Check

1. Read `GAMEFARM_REVIEW.md`. If Final Verdict is **NEEDS_REWORK**: STOP — write `![next]!` so card_08 cleans up without committing.
2. Read `GAMEFARM_SPRINT.md` to get: branch name, target files, issue summary, sprint type.

---

### Phase 1 — Stage Carefully

```bash
cd C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\GameFarmerJS
git status
```

Stage ONLY source files and new asset PNGs belonging to this sprint:
```bash
git add src/...
git add assets/image/...   # only if new PNGs were added
git add CREDITS.md          # only if attribution was added
```

**Never stage**: `GAMEFARM_AUDIT.md`, `GAMEFARM_SPRINT.md`, `GAMEFARM_REVIEW.md`, `GAMEFARM_ASSETS.md`, `GAMEFARM_CHANGELOG.md`, `GAMEFARM_BACKLOG.md`, `current_task.md`.

Verify staged list:
```bash
git diff --cached --name-only
```

---

### Phase 2 — Commit with Structured Message

Prefix rules:
- `refactor` — DRY/abstraction improvements
- `feat` — new crops, decorations, new elements
- `fix` — bug fixes, typos, broken stubs
- `chore` — constants, magic numbers, housekeeping

Message format:
```
<prefix>(<scope>): <one-line summary under 72 chars>

Why: <problem this solves>
What: <files changed and approach>
Assets: <new sprites added, if any — omit if code sprint>
Scope: ~N lines added, ~N lines removed

Reviewed-by: agent self-review (GAMEFARM_REVIEW.md)
```

Example:
```
refactor(buttons): introduce ItemRegistry.getItem to deduplicate element lookup

Why: ButtonBuy, ButtonSell, and ButtonMore each duplicated
     Element.getElementFromId(id) || Resource.getResource(id).
What: new src/game_manager/item_registry.js; updated 3 button files.
Scope: ~18 lines added, ~12 lines removed

Reviewed-by: agent self-review (GAMEFARM_REVIEW.md)
```

---

### Phase 3 — Merge to Main

```bash
git checkout main
git merge --no-ff <branch from GAMEFARM_SPRINT.md> -m "Merge <branch>"
git branch -d <branch>
```

---

### Phase 4 — Push to Remote

```bash
git push origin main
```

---

### Phase 5 — Append to GAMEFARM_CHANGELOG.md

```markdown
## [cycle N] YYYY-MM-DD — <scope>
- **Sprint type**: code | asset
- **Target**: <file(s)>
- **Change**: <one-liner>
- **Assets added**: <list or none>
- **Lines changed**: N added, N removed
- **Branch**: <branch> (merged and deleted)
- **DRY issues remaining**: <count of FOUND P1 items in current backlog>
```

Determine cycle N by counting existing `## [cycle` headers (start at 1).

Write `![next]!` when the merge commit is on main, the branch is deleted, and changelog is updated.
